prerequisites.label: Python 3.9+
prerequisites.satisfy: Install Python 3.9 or newer. Mac: brew install python@3.12. VPS: ships in the container image.

prerequisites.label: sqlite3 CLI
prerequisites.satisfy: Optional. Install sqlite3 for manual DB inspection. Mac: brew install sqlite. VPS: apt-get install sqlite3.

prerequisites.label: AI Workforce interview complete (gates REAL-workforce materialization; the CC shell itself ships locked to /interview first)
prerequisites.satisfy: Complete the AI Workforce interview (Skill 23) first. Ratified 2026-07-03 (OQ-1): the CC ships FIRST but LOCKED to /interview (the CC middleware / P0-5 302s non-/interview, non-/onboarding pages to /interview while interviewComplete is false, and unlocks the full dashboard at buildCompletedAt). That locked interview-shell is BY DESIGN, not a bug. This interviewComplete gate protects the REAL zero-human workforce (departments, roles, agents) — building it before the interview yields a default-floor board under company 'default'. If not complete, the installer REPORTS 'interview not completed yet' and exits without scaffolding the real workforce.
